summary: Matched or partially implemented several melee/lb library functions across lbAudioAx, lbMthp, lbRefract, lbBgFlash, and lbSnap. The PR replaced multiple NonMatching stubs with C implementations, refined headers with concrete signatures, added missing GX/baselib includes, and introduced local/static struct definitions needed for matching. Review feedback emphasized that matching should not come at the cost of raw pointer/offset accesses: offsets should be represented through real datatypes when possible, or at least through M2C_FIELD for grepability and future decomp reuse.
what_changed: Implemented fn_800263B4 in lbaudio_ax.c as a NULL-guarded HSD_ObjFree call using lbl_80433710.

Implemented lbAudioAx_800265C4 in lbaudio_ax.c to iterate HSD_GObj_Entities, inspect gobj->user_data, key off a matching AX driver sound id with AXDriverKeyOff, unlink the gobj with HSD_GObjPLink_80390228, and return a bool success value.
Updated lbaudio_ax.h signatures: fn_800263B4 became void fn_800263B4(void* ptr), and lbAudioAx_800265C4 became bool lbAudioAx_800265C4(HSD_GObj*, int sfx) instead of enum_t.
Added m2c_macros.h and baselib/gobjplink.h includes for the lbAudioAx implementation.

Added a local BgFlashData2 struct in lbbgflash.c and updated fn_800204C8's header declaration to void fn_800204C8(void). The PR summary says fn_800204C8 reached 91.9%, but the excerpt does not show the full implementation.
Implemented lbMthp8001F890 to initialize fields in lbl_804335B8, create an SObj through HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, set bit 0x10 on x40, and return the created object pointer.
Implemented lbMthp8001F928 to initialize and load three GXTexObj textures: one full-size texture and two half-size textures, then call HSD_SObjLib_803A49E0.
Added GXTexture, GXStruct, and sobjlib includes needed by lbMthp code.

Expanded lbmthp.static.h with struct HSD_SObj_803A477C_t_ext, struct lbl_804335B8_t containing GXTexObj fields, image pointers, dimensions, object state fields, and STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct lbl_804335B8_t) == 0xA0).
Updated lbmthp.h so lbMthp8001F890 returns void* rather than UNK_T.

Implemented lbRefract_8002247C to build light projection matrices based on HSD_CObjGetProjectionType using MTXLightPerspective, MTXLightFrustum, or MTXLightOrtho, with several camera fields accessed through M2C_FIELD.
Implemented lbRefract_80022560 to copy a 0x280 by 0x1E0 source to a 0x140 by 0xF0 texture, then sync/invalidate GX texture state when lbl_804336D0 is active.
Added static fn_80022608 in lbrefract.c to dispatch through hsdDObj.disp and then restore TEV/direct indirect-stage state via GXSetTevDirect, GXSetNumIndStages, and HSD_StateInvalidate.
Added baselib/cobj.h and baselib/dobj.h includes in lbrefract.c and declared extern HSD_DObjInfo hsdDObj.
Adjusted lbSnap_8001DF6C to store ptr->unk0 in a local ret variable and return ret at the end, a control-flow reshaping likely used to match generated assembly.
smart_moves: Used concrete return types in headers once behavior was known, especially bool for lbAudioAx_800265C4 after review identified the correct return type.
Added static struct layouts with field offsets and STATIC_ASSERT for lbMthp global data, making later matching around lbl_804335B8 more reusable than anonymous raw offsets.
Pulled in precise subsystem headers such as GXTexture.h, GXStruct.h, baselib/cobj.h, baselib/dobj.h, baselib/gobjplink.h, and sobjlib.h rather than relying only on forward declarations.
For lbSnap_8001DF6C, preserved behavior while changing local variable lifetime/control flow to satisfy matching constraints without broad semantic changes.
Used M2C_FIELD for unavoidable unknown-field accesses in the final excerpt, aligning with reviewer guidance better than raw pointer arithmetic.
decomp_lessons: Do not optimize only for match percentage if it hides useful type information. Reviewer feedback explicitly said filling in datatypes can be more valuable to overall decompilation speed than a single function match.
Raw offset accesses are hard to grep and do not help future code reuse. Prefer updating relevant struct definitions with real fields when the offsets are understood.
If a field is still unknown and a raw access is unavoidable, use M2C_FIELD so the access is searchable and mechanically recognizable.
Header signatures should be tightened as soon as return values and parameter roles are known; here lbAudioAx_800265C4 was corrected to return bool.
Static globals that are central to a subsystem should get named struct layouts and size assertions where evidence supports them, as in lbmthp.static.h.
AI-generated matching code needs guards against choosing raw access patterns just to maximize match percentage; the author acknowledged this in response to review.
naming_conventions: Library subsystem functions keep the lb-prefixed module naming style: lbAudioAx_800265C4, lbMthp8001F890, lbMthp8001F928, lbRefract_8002247C, lbSnap_8001DF6C.
Still-unknown functions retain address-based fn_ names such as fn_800263B4, fn_800204C8, and fn_80022608.
Inferred static/global structs use address-label names with _t suffixes, such as lbl_804335B8_t and lbl_804333E0_t.
Temporary or uncertain fields in inferred structs use x-offset names such as x6C, x6E, x70, x90, matching existing decomp convention when semantic names are not yet proven.
Extended/incomplete external struct modeling used a suffix such as HSD_SObj_803A477C_t_ext, signaling that the definition is local and partial.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK in lbAudioAx_800265C4 and lbSnap_8001DF6C to preserve stack layout for matching.
Changed lbSnap_8001DF6C to assign the return value to a local ret and use a single final return, a common tactic for matching compiler control flow.
Used pointer-to-local aliases for width and height in lbMthp8001F928 before shifting them for half-size texture dimensions, likely to influence load/order/codegen.
Accessed unresolved camera fields in lbRefract_8002247C through M2C_FIELD at offsets 0x38, 0x40, 0x44, 0x48, and 0x4c.
Modeled GXTexObj-containing global storage with exact offsets and STATIC_ASSERT to stabilize codegen for texture initialization calls.
Used direct bit manipulation on lbl_804335B8.x90->x40 with |= 0x10 to match SObj flag-setting behavior.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Reviewer objected to raw accesses because they are not practical to grep and avoid improving shared datatypes. They emphasized that filling in datatypes is arguably more useful than decompiling a single function for overall project velocity.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: If raw field access is unavoidable, use the M2C_FIELD macro and teach automation to do the same.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: lbAudioAx_800265C4 returns bool, not a generic integer/enum-like type.

review_feedback.author: itsgrimetime
review_feedback.feedback: Author acknowledged the problem and said better guards were needed because the tool kept prioritizing match percentage over desired decompilation quality.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that replace M2C_FIELD camera accesses in lbRefract_8002247C with typed HSD_CObj fields.
Search for later changes to HSD_GObj_Entities or HSD_GObj user_data typing related to lbAudioAx_800265C4.
Check whether BgFlashData2 in lbbgflash.c was later moved to a shared header or given semantic field names.
Look for follow-up PRs that refine HSD_SObj_803A477C_t_ext or lbl_804335B8_t into shared baselib/sobj types.
Search review comments mentioning raw access, M2C_FIELD, or match percentage to identify project-wide AI decomp guidance.
